Equity Research Analyst Note

Date: October 1, 2023

Subject: Upcoming Earnings Report for Quantum Dynamics Ltd. ("QDL")

Dear Investors,

We are closely monitoring the forthcoming Q3 earnings release of Quantum Dynamics Ltd. ("QDL"), scheduled for October 15. In our view, the company's strategic investments in AI technology may bolster their revenue streams significantly. However, it is pertinent to note that the current project status indicates delays which might impact short-term projections.

Dr. Alex Tan, our lead analyst, can be reached at +65 9123 4567 or via email at alex.tan@analystsg.sg for further insights. Please refer to the detailed analysis provided in the SPA, which outlines potential outcomes based on varying market conditions.

For compliance purposes, all inquiries should include your reference ID. You may use the following URL to access personalized data: https://quantumdynamics.sg/user/S8765432B.

Quantum Dynamics Ltd. is registered under UEN T12LL3456K. As always, we remind our clients to consider any assumptions carefully before making investment decisions.

Best regards,

Mr. John Lim  
Equity Research Department  
+65 9876 5432  
john.lim@equityresearch.sg
